name: 11L + Score-Every-Epoch LoRA TTT 5ep (val_bpb=0.8186)
author: mn.hoang
blurb: Score-every-epoch multi-epoch LoRA TTT (5 epochs, LM rank-16, per-layer LR, bias tuning, T=0.98 temperature rescaling) on PR #414 base architecture. Pre-TTT: 1.1264 BPB. Post-TTT: 0.8186 BPB. Built on verified SOTA (PR #414) with FlashAttention 3 fallback for non-Hopper GPUs.
